name: profiles/active.sh switches the active profile when invoked with a set argument
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'active_profile: baseline\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/active.sh" --set high-risk --state .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml 2>err.txt && grep -q 'active_profile: high-risk' .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
